faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.meta_description: Find answers to common questions about BookPrinta's professional book publishing services, pricing, turnaround, and more.
faq.hero_subtitle: Everything you need to know about publishing your book with BookPrinta.
faq.hero_image_alt: Hands carefully holding an open book
faq.divider_alt_2: Open manuscript pages on a desk
faq.a1: BookPrinta is a professional book publishing platform designed for Nigerian authors. We take your raw manuscript (DOCX or PDF) and transform it into a beautifully formatted, print-ready book — handling everything from typesetting to printing and delivery.
faq.q2: How does the publishing process work?
faq.a2: It's simple: upload your manuscript, choose a package, and we handle the rest. Our AI-powered engine cleans and formats your text, generates a professional layout, and you get to preview every page before approving for print. Once approved, your book is printed and delivered within days.
faq.q3: What file formats do you accept?
faq.a3: We accept DOCX (Microsoft Word) and PDF files up to 10MB. We recommend DOCX for the best formatting results, as our engine can better parse and reformat the text.
faq.q4: Can I get an ISBN for my book?
faq.a4: Yes! ISBN registration is available as an add-on with our Glow Up and Legacy packages. It's automatically included with the Legacy package. An ISBN makes your book discoverable in global book databases.
faq.a5: Cover design is included in our Glow Up and Legacy packages. For the First Draft package, you can provide your own cover design. We also offer custom cover design as a standalone add-on service.
faq.q6: How much does it cost to publish a book?
faq.a6: We offer three packages starting from affordable rates. The First Draft package covers basic formatting and printing, the Glow Up adds professional cover design and ISBN, and the Legacy package includes everything plus premium finishing. Visit our pricing page for detailed pricing.
faq.q7: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a7: We accept bank transfers, Paystack (cards, USSD, mobile money), and Stripe for international payments. PayPal is also available for international authors.
faq.q8: Can I get a custom quote?
faq.a8: Absolutely! If your project has unique requirements — special paper stock, large print runs, unusual trim sizes, or premium finishing — use our custom quote form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a tailored proposal.
faq.a9: Standard turnaround is 72 hours after you approve your book preview. During peak periods, it may take slightly longer — we'll notify you if there are any delays. Rush printing is available on request.
faq.q10: What is the minimum order quantity?
faq.a10: The minimum order is 25 copies. This allows us to maintain professional print quality while keeping prices affordable. For larger quantities, we offer volume discounts.
faq.a11: Yes! Once your book is published, you can reprint it at any time from your dashboard. You can choose to reprint the exact same version or make revisions before reprinting.
faq.a12: We offer refunds on a case-by-case basis. If there's a quality issue with your printed books, contact us and we'll make it right. Refunds are not available after you've approved the final preview, as manufacturing begins immediately.
faq.a13: You can reach us through our contact page, WhatsApp, or email. We typically respond within a few hours during business days. For urgent matters, WhatsApp is the fastest way to reach our team.

about.meta_title: About BookPrinta — Publishing, Reimagined for Nigeria
about.meta_description: Learn why BookPrinta exists, what drives our mission, and how we're helping authors publish professional books in Nigeria.
about.meta_og_description: Discover the story behind BookPrinta and the mission powering better publishing for Nigerian authors.
about.meta_og_image_alt: BookPrinta logo on a dark background
about.hero_subtitle: We built BookPrinta so authors can move from manuscript to professional print without confusion, gatekeeping, or delays.
about.hero_image_alt: Books stacked in a modern publishing workspace
about.story_heading: Built for authors who deserve better publishing support.
about.story_paragraph_1: BookPrinta started with a simple observation: too many brilliant manuscripts never become high-quality books because the process is fragmented, expensive, and difficult to trust.
about.story_paragraph_2: We created a modern publishing pipeline that combines editorial structure, production quality, and transparent workflows so authors can stay focused on their voice.
about.story_paragraph_3: From formatting to print delivery, every step is designed to be clear, reliable, and built around the realities of publishing in Nigeria.
about.stats_focus_subtext: This is the publishing scale we are building toward with every author we serve.
about.values_heading: Everything we build starts with author success.
about.value_1_body: Technology handles repetition, but your story remains human. We design workflows that protect author intent at every stage.
about.value_2_body: From typography to print finishing, we treat each book like a product that should feel premium in hand.
about.value_3_body: Clear package structures and quote visibility mean no hidden costs and fewer surprises during production.
about.value_4_body: Our operations, timelines, and support model are built for local realities while keeping global-quality standards.
about.team_placeholder_title: Growing a publishing team for every author journey.
about.team_placeholder_body: We're expanding our editorial, production, and support teams to serve more authors across Nigeria.
about.team_image_alt: BookPrinta team collaborating in the studio
about.cta_heading: Ready to publish your book with confidence?
about.cta_subtitle: Choose a package or request a custom quote. We'll help you move from draft to bookshelf.
about.jsonld_description: BookPrinta helps authors transform manuscripts into professional, print-ready books.

dashboard.processing_tip_1: Did you know? BookPrinta uses AI to format your manuscript into professional semantic HTML — preserving chapters, headings, and structure.
dashboard.processing_tip_2: Did you know? Your page count is calculated server-side using actual rendering, not just word estimates — so the billing count is accurate.
dashboard.processing_tip_3: Did you know? You can change your font size and book size at any time before approving — formatting will re-run automatically.
dashboard.processing_tip_4: Did you know? Longer manuscripts are automatically split into chunks and processed in parallel for faster turnaround.
dashboard.processing_tip_5: Did you know? The browser preview uses Paged.js to show exactly how your book will look when printed.

legal_refund.title: Refund Policy
legal_refund.subtitle: How refunds are reviewed and approved at BookPrinta.
legal_refund.intro: Refund eligibility depends on current production stage and completed services.
legal_refund.point_1: If processing has not started, eligible refunds are reviewed within 5 business days.

legal_refund.point_3: Approved refunds are returned through the original payment channel.

footer.cta_description: Have an enquiry? Simply get in touch using the button below.

home.how_subtitle: From manuscript to printed book in three simple steps. No hassle, no jargon — just results.
home.how_step1_desc: Submit your DOCX or PDF file through our secure portal. Our AI engine cleans and prepares your text instantly.
home.how_step2_desc: Our team crafts a professional layout, beautiful cover, and polished typesetting — ready for print.
home.how_step3_desc: Approve your preview, and we print and deliver your finished books within 72 hours. It's that simple.
home.pricing_subtitle: Choose the package that fits your vision. Every plan includes professional formatting and printing.
home.pricing_first_draft_desc: Basic formatting and printing for authors on a budget.
home.pricing_glow_up_desc: The full package — cover design, ISBN, and premium formatting.
home.pricing_legacy_desc: Premium publishing with hardcover, ISBN, and distribution support.
home.showcase_subtitle: Real books, real authors, real impact. Browse stories from Nigerian authors who trusted us with their vision.
home.testimonials_subtitle: Hear from the writers who brought their stories to life with BookPrinta.
home.testimonial_1_quote: BookPrinta turned my manuscript into a stunning book in under a week. The quality exceeded my expectations — my readers couldn't believe I published it in Nigeria.
home.testimonial_2_quote: As a first-time author, I was nervous about the whole process. The BookPrinta team guided me through every step. My book looks absolutely professional.
home.testimonial_3_quote: I've published three books with BookPrinta now. Fast turnaround, beautiful design, and their pricing is unbeatable. They truly understand Nigerian authors.
home.faq_subtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions about publishing with BookPrinta.
home.cta_subtitle: Join hundreds of Nigerian authors who have published beautiful, professional books with BookPrinta.

terms.meta_description: Review the terms that govern your use of BookPrinta's publishing, printing, payment, and order services.
terms.title: Terms & Conditions

intro.paragraph_1: These Terms & Conditions govern your access to and use of BookPrinta's website, tools, and publishing services.
intro.paragraph_2: By creating an account, submitting content, requesting a quote, or placing an order, you agree to these terms.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.paragraph_1: When you access or use BookPrinta, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to these terms and any related policies referenced on the platform.
acceptance.paragraph_2: If you use the service on behalf of another person, publisher, or organization, you confirm that you have the authority to bind them to these terms.

services.title: Services
services.paragraph_1: BookPrinta provides services related to manuscript intake, text preparation, formatting, design coordination, print production, previews, and delivery support, depending on the package, add-ons, or custom quote you select.
services.paragraph_2: Service timelines and outputs may vary based on manuscript quality, revision requests, approval speed, provider availability, and operational constraints.

payment.title: Payment Policy
payment.paragraph_1: Prices shown on the website or issued in a custom quote apply only to the services and quantities selected for your order. Payments may be processed through providers such as Paystack, Stripe, PayPal, or verified bank transfer.
payment.paragraph_2: Production, fulfillment, or delivery work may begin only after payment is successfully confirmed. You are responsible for accurate billing information and for any approved extra charges, including add-ons, revisions, shipping, or page overages.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.paragraph_1: Refund requests are reviewed case by case. Once you approve a final preview or production has begun, refunds are generally not available because manufacturing and fulfillment work may already be in progress.
refund.paragraph_2: If a verified error is caused by BookPrinta, we may decide to provide a correction, reprint, service credit, or partial or full refund, depending on the circumstances.
refund.paragraph_3: If you believe there is an issue with your order, contact us promptly through our <contactPage>contact page</contactPage> or by email at <email>{contactEmail}</email> so we can review the matter.

acceptable_content.title: Acceptable Content
acceptable_content.paragraph_1: You remain responsible for every file, image, manuscript, and instruction you submit to BookPrinta. You must own the necessary rights or have permission to use and publish that content.
acceptable_content.paragraph_2: Submitted content must not be unlawful, infringing, defamatory, hateful, abusive, fraudulent, misleading, or otherwise harmful, and it must not include malicious or unsafe files.
acceptable_content.paragraph_3: We may ask for clarification, proof of ownership, or additional review before processing content that raises legal, editorial, or safety concerns.

right_to_refuse.title: BookPrinta's Right to Refuse Orders
right_to_refuse.paragraph_1: BookPrinta may decline, pause, or cancel an order if submitted content or instructions violate these terms, applicable law, the rights of others, payment verification requirements, or operational limitations.
right_to_refuse.paragraph_2: We may also request edits, proof of ownership, identity confirmation, or payment confirmation before continuing with a project.

liability_limitations.title: Liability Limitations
liability_limitations.paragraph_1: To the fullest extent permitted by law, BookPrinta is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential losses, including loss of profit, business interruption, data loss, or reputational harm.
liability_limitations.paragraph_2: You remain responsible for the accuracy, legality, and final approval of your manuscript, metadata, uploaded files, and production instructions.
liability_limitations.paragraph_3: Where liability cannot be excluded, BookPrinta's total liability for a claim connected to an order will not exceed the amount paid for that order.

governing_law.title: Governing Law
governing_law.paragraph_1: These terms are governed by the applicable laws of the Federal Republic of Nigeria.
governing_law.paragraph_2: If a dispute arises, both parties agree to try to resolve it in good faith first. If that is not possible, the dispute will be handled by a court with competent jurisdiction in Nigeria.

refund_policy.title: Refund Policy

privacy.meta_description: Learn what personal data BookPrinta collects, how it is used, and the choices you have regarding your information.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

intro.paragraph_1: This Privacy Policy explains how BookPrinta collects, uses, stores, and shares personal information when you use our website, request a quote, place an order, or contact our team.
intro.paragraph_2: We collect only the information we need to operate the service, support your publishing journey, and meet legal, payment, and security obligations.

data_collected.title: Data Collected
data_collected.paragraph_1: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, phone number, billing and delivery details, manuscript files, order notes, and support messages.
data_collected.paragraph_2: We may also collect account records, order history, payment status and provider reference data, device and browser details, and cookie or usage information needed to operate and secure the platform.

how_we_use_data.title: How We Use Data
how_we_use_data.paragraph_1: We use your data to create and manage accounts, process quotes and orders, handle payments, provide publishing services, send transactional updates, and respond to support requests.
how_we_use_data.paragraph_2: We may also use data to improve product performance, measure service quality, prevent fraud or abuse, maintain security, and comply with legal or regulatory obligations.

data_sharing.title: Data Sharing
data_sharing.paragraph_1: We share personal information only with trusted service providers and partners that help us operate BookPrinta, such as payment processors, cloud storage and hosting providers, communication tools, and production or fulfillment partners.
data_sharing.paragraph_2: We do not sell your personal data. We may disclose information when required by law, to enforce our policies, or to protect the rights, safety, and integrity of BookPrinta, our users, or third parties.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.paragraph_1: BookPrinta uses cookies and similar technologies for essential website functionality, session continuity, preference storage, analytics, and service improvement.
cookies.paragraph_2: You can manage cookies through your browser settings, but disabling certain cookies may affect how parts of the site function.

user_rights.title: User Rights
user_rights.paragraph_1: Depending on the law that applies to you, you may have the right to request access to your personal data, ask for corrections, request deletion, object to certain processing, or withdraw consent where consent applies.
user_rights.paragraph_2: You may also opt out of non-essential marketing communications at any time. Before we act on certain requests, we may need to verify your identity to protect your information.

contact.title: Contact
contact.paragraph_1: For privacy questions, data requests, or complaints, contact us at <email>{contactEmail}</email> or use our <contactPage>contact page</contactPage>.
contact.paragraph_2: We review privacy requests within a reasonable time and may retain limited records where necessary for legal, accounting, fraud prevention, or security purposes.

cookies_page.meta_description: Learn how BookPrinta uses cookies, the types of cookies we rely on, and how you can manage your preferences.
cookies_page.title: Cookie Policy

intro.paragraph_1: This Cookie Policy explains how BookPrinta uses cookies and similar technologies when you visit our website, sign in to your account, place orders, or interact with support and product features.
intro.paragraph_2: We use cookies to keep the platform secure, remember your preferences, measure performance, and improve the publishing experience across devices.

what_cookies_are.title: What Cookies Are
what_cookies_are.paragraph_1: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember actions and preferences, recognise returning users, and support important functionality such as login sessions and cart or quote activity.
what_cookies_are.paragraph_2: Some cookies are set only for the length of your browser session, while others remain for a longer period so your preferences and security settings can be remembered the next time you return.

how_we_use_cookies.title: How We Use Cookies
how_we_use_cookies.paragraph_1: BookPrinta uses cookies and similar technologies to keep accounts signed in, support checkout and dashboard flows, remember language or interface preferences, prevent abuse, and understand how the website and order journey are performing.
how_we_use_cookies.paragraph_2: We may also use measurement or diagnostic cookies to identify broken flows, improve speed and usability, and maintain a reliable customer experience across the marketing site and the app.

cookie_choices.title: Your Cookie Choices
cookie_choices.paragraph_1: You can control or remove cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers let you block certain categories of cookies, clear stored cookies, or alert you before a cookie is saved.
cookie_choices.paragraph_2: Please note that disabling essential cookies may affect sign-in, order tracking, checkout, saved preferences, or other core parts of the BookPrinta experience.

third_party_tools.title: Third-Party Tools
third_party_tools.paragraph_1: Some cookies may be placed by trusted third-party services that help us process payments, measure traffic, secure the platform, or support customer communication. These providers may collect limited technical data in line with their own policies.
third_party_tools.paragraph_2: We review the tools we use and aim to work only with providers that support secure, privacy-conscious operations for publishing, payments, and support.

contact.title: Contact
contact.paragraph_1: If you have questions about how BookPrinta uses cookies or related tracking technologies, contact us at <email>{contactEmail}</email> or use our <contactPage>contact page</contactPage>.
contact.paragraph_2: If your request relates more broadly to personal data rights, please also review our Privacy Policy for additional details on data handling and user choices.

not_found.title: Page Not Found
not_found.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Let's get you back to a chapter that does.

offline.title: You're Offline
offline.description: Check your connection and try again.
